turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I had my tonsil removal surgery here last week. My throat is still hurting a lot. Is this expected?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can hear you're uncomfortable and I'm sorry you're going through that. Could I have your name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Akash, post-tonsillectomy pain is common, but the severity and duration really need to be assessed by a medical professional. I'm not able to advise on whether your level of pain is expected or concerning — I don't want to guess on something this important.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's exactly the kind of question our ENT team or nursing staff can answer properly. Let me connect you to them right now so they can advise you appropriately.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. Please hold — let me connect you to our staff immediately.
